structural.narrative: EU ETS cap 2026: 1,183 Mt. Latest verified emissions (963 Mt from 2025). Market balance: -84 Mt (shortage). Cap declining at 74 Mt/year. Structural inflection (cap < last known emissions) expected by 2029. MSR absorbing 304 Mt (TNAC=1,183M, holdings=400M). Effective tightening: 304 Mt removed from market. Structural SHORTAGE: cap + MSR absorption below emissions. Expect upward price pressure over 6-12 month horizon.
